title: T-011 — seed override_reason_codes reference table
prompt:
# T-011 — seed override_reason_codes reference table

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §8.2 POST /assignments/:id/override (reason_code field), prototype `override_assignment_modal` translation note: 'reference data table override_reason_codes'
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create `override_reason_codes` reference table + seed its initial values (customer_priority|material_shortage|machine_breakdown|allergen_constraint|other) per §8.2 enum.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/0079_override_reason_codes.sql`: CREATE TABLE override_reason_codes (code TEXT PRIMARY KEY, label_key TEXT NOT NULL, sort_order INTEGER NOT NULL, active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true).
2. Seed file `packages/db/seeds/0002_override_reason_codes.ts` inserts the 5 reasons with i18n label keys (`scheduler.override.reason.customer_priority`, etc).
3. Drizzle schema entry.
4. Idempotent seed.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0079_override_reason_codes.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/override_reason_codes.ts [create]
- packages/db/seeds/0002_override_reason_codes.ts [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/seed-override-reason-codes.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0079 applied, when \d override_reason_codes runs, then code (PK), label_key, sort_order, active columns exist
2. Given seed runs, when SELECT count(*) FROM override_reason_codes, then result is 5 (customer_priority, material_shortage, machine_breakdown, allergen_constraint, other)
3. Given seed runs twice, when second run completes, then no duplicates (idempotent UPSERT on code)

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/seed-override-reason-codes.test.ts asserting count + idempotency + all 5 codes present
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db seed override-reason-codes && pnpm --filter db test seed-override-reason-codes'

## Risk red lines
- Do not hardcode i18n labels in DB; only label_key (next-intl resolves at render time)
- Do not omit 'other' code (UI relies on it as fallback)
- Do not put RLS on this reference table (cross-tenant shared)

pipeline_inputs.description: Create + seed override_reason_codes reference table (5 codes, i18n keys, no RLS — shared across tenants).
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0079 + seed 0002 create cross-tenant reference table holding 5 standard override reasons with i18n label_key entries. Idempotent UPSERT keeps re-runs safe. RED test verifies count, idempotency, label_key shape.
out_of_scope: Do not seed i18n strings (handled in next-intl bundles)
Do not add RLS on this reference table
Do not use this for other override flows beyond scheduler
